user_query:
I need a 2-week social content plan for our B2B analytics SaaS focused on LinkedIn and Twitter. Please read all inputs under input/:
- input/brand_brief.md (our goals, audience, and voice)
- input/past_posts.csv (historical performance)
- input/schedule.yaml (start_date and end_date for the plan)
- input/platform_focus.txt (target platforms)

Deliver all outputs to output/ with these exact files and formats:
1) output/pillars.json
- JSON array of 3–5 content pillars.
- Each item: {"name": string, "percent": number}.
- Percents must sum to 100 (±1 tolerance allowed). Names must be unique.

2) output/hooks.md
- At least 12 total hooks using the four categories from our strategy.
- Each line must start with exactly one of: "Curiosity: ", "Story: ", "Value: ", or "Contrarian: ".
- Provide at least 3 hooks per category.

3) output/calendar.csv
- Comma-separated with header row: date,platform,format,topic_pillar,hook_type,post_copy,cta
- Use the inclusive date range from input/schedule.yaml (weekdays only). For each weekday in that range, include:
  - At least 1 LinkedIn post.
  - At least 2 Twitter entries: one with format "Thread" and one with format "Tweet".
- topic_pillar values must match a pillar name from output/pillars.json exactly.
- hook_type must be one of: Curiosity, Story, Value, Contrarian.
- For Twitter rows only, keep post_copy length <= 280 characters.

4) output/analysis.json
- JSON with fields:
  - "engagement_rate_formula": "(likes+comments+shares)/impressions"
  - "top_3": array of the three post_ids with the highest engagement rate from input/past_posts.csv (descending)
  - "bottom_3": array of the three post_ids with the lowest engagement rate (ascending)

5) output/engagement_routine.md
- A concise daily engagement checklist tailored to our brief that includes these exact four lines somewhere in the file:
  - "Respond to comments"
  - "Comment on 5-10 target accounts"
  - "Share/repost with added insight"
  - "Send 2-3 DMs to new connections"

Use the brand context and platform-specific best practices, apply content pillars, hook formulas, and analytics findings from the past posts to shape the plan. Keep everything text-only and ensure the calendar aligns with the date range in input/schedule.yaml. Write nothing outside the output/ directory.
